# Benefind -- Find Every Benefit You Deserve
# https://benefind.app

> Benefind is a free AI-powered eligibility screener for US government benefit programs.
> It covers 25+ federal and state programs across consumer and business tracks.

## Key Pages

- https://benefind.app/screening -- Free eligibility screener for individuals
- https://benefind.app/screening/company -- Free eligibility screener for businesses
- https://benefind.app/blog -- Guides and articles on government benefits
- https://benefind.app/docs/guides -- Step-by-step application guides
- https://benefind.app/programs -- Full program catalog
